description_long: This is a freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown, polished top surface and a distressed, light beige body. The front features two rectangular doors with round knobs and two upper drawers, each with a metal pull handle, providing ample storage space. The sides and back are plain, with recessed rectangular panels that add a touch of classic design. The cabinet stands on four short legs, slightly elevating it from the ground. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for use in garages, workshops, or as utility furniture in urban environments. The finish is matte with visible wood grain and subtle wear, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description: A sturdy, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown top, two front doors, and two upper drawers, finished in distressed beige with metal handles. The design is classic and utilitarian, suitable for urban utility or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metal handles and two doors with round knobs, all set in a distressed beige frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain beige panel with recessed detailing and the dark brown top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a simple, flat beige panel with two recessed rectangles and no visible hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a plain beige panel and dark brown top.
